label: go

claimProbes.statement: Nectin-4 (PVRL4) is a cell-surface adhesion molecule overexpressed in urothelial and other epithelial carcinomas, and the Nectin-4-directed ADC enfortumab vedotin produces clinical responses in advanced urothelial cancer.
Nectin-4 is a secreted cytokine with no membrane expression, which is why it cannot be targeted by antibody-drug conjugates.
claimProbes.note: False: Nectin-4 is a transmembrane adhesion molecule.

rationale: Validated urothelial ADC target (enfortumab vedotin approved); watch floor for breadth beyond urothelial and tolerability.
